name: codex-log-viewer
description: Local-first native macOS app and parser for OpenAI Codex session logs.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/server && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/cli
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:mac
scripts.test: npm run test -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run test -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && npm run test -w @codex-log-viewer/server && npm run test -w @codex-log-viewer/cli
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run lint && npm run build:mac
scripts.build:native-engine: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/server
scripts.build:mac: npm run version:sync && swift build --package-path apps/macos
scripts.release:mac: npm run package:mac && npm run smoke:mac-package && npm run smoke:mac-ui
scripts.check:classifier: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && node scripts/check-prompt-intents.mjs
scripts.evals:report: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && node scripts/evals-report.mjs
scripts.evals:export-fixture-draft: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && node scripts/export-reviewed-eval-fixtures.mjs
scripts.benchmark:search: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && node scripts/benchmark-search.mjs
scripts.check:reference: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && node scripts/check-reference-report.mjs
scripts.demo:data: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && node scripts/generate-web-demo-data.mjs
scripts.check:web-demo-data: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && node scripts/generate-web-demo-data.mjs --check
scripts.app:mac: npm run build:native-engine && npm run version:sync && CODEX_LOG_VIEWER_REPO=$PWD swift run --package-path apps/macos CodexLogViewerMac
scripts.cli: npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/parser && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/analytics && npm run build -w @codex-log-viewer/cli && node apps/cli/dist/index.js
